description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Evennia test-suite and coveralls that runs on every push to master and develop branches and on pull requests to those branches. Use an ubuntu-latest job matrix to test with Python 3.7 and 3.8 and various databases (sqlite3, postgresql, mysql). For each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies, set up Evennia, and run tests with coverage. Additionally, run a separate ubuntu-latest job to upload test coverage to Coveralls.
